description_long: This object is a modern grave site set on a rectangular stone platform with a paved border. The main feature is a two-tone upright headstone, combining a black polished slab and a lighter gray stone slab, with the black portion bearing inscriptions and a cross. In front of the headstone lies a raised rectangular grave cover made of matching gray stone. Three black cubic structures, likely serving as candle or flower holders, are aligned in front of the grave, each with a recessed circular area on top. The entire arrangement is surrounded by a patterned stone or concrete pavement, providing a clean and respectful setting. The materials and design suggest durability and solemnity, suitable for a contemporary cemetery.
description: A modern grave site with a two-tone upright headstone, a raised stone grave cover, and three black cubic holders on a paved platform.
description_view_0: Side view showing the upright headstone's thickness and the three black cubic holders aligned in front.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the headstone and the full length of the grave cover, with the holders visible beyond.
description_view_2: Frontal view displaying the inscribed headstone, cross, and the arrangement of the grave cover and holders.
description_view_3: View from the foot of the grave, focusing on the three black cubic holders and the length of the grave cover.
